nodes.label: Regression tests for start.sh's .env parsing handling readonly bash variables.
Pin start.sh's .env parser against the docker-compose macOS UID/GID flow.
The bootstrap regression guard at test_bootstrap_dotenv.py:181         requires
The readonly bash names (UID/GID/EUID/EGID/PPID) must be filtered         out of
Filter must use a pattern that strips readonly-var lines before         the bash
The ``export`` prefix on env vars is optional but common.  The         readonly-
Behavioral tests — actually run bash to verify .env parsing succeeds.      These
Write ``env_contents`` to a tmp .env and run start.sh's loader against it.
The exact macOS docker-compose pattern: UID + GID in .env.
`export UID=501` form must also be filtered.
UID, GID, EUID, EGID, PPID — all five must be filtered.
A .env without readonly vars must still load all keys.
